de.name: Tägliches Produkt-Briefing
de.description: Produkt-Tagesbriefing — Mindestbestand, ohne Bild/Beschreibung, Slow-Mover, Preisanpassung — täglich um 07:00.

prefill.name: Tägliches Produkt-Briefing
prefill.description: 3-4 wichtigsten Produkt-Themen für den Tag — Bestand, Artikelqualität, Preise.

angles: Artikel ohne Bestand (im Shop ausblenden oder nachbestellen)

en.name: Daily Product Briefing
en.description: Product daily briefing — minimum stock, missing image/description, slow-movers, price adjustments — every day at 07:00.

prefill.name: Daily Product Briefing
prefill.description: Top 3-4 product topics for today — stock, product quality, prices.

angles: Products without image (conversion risk — add images)
Products out of stock (hide in shop or reorder)
Products without description (SEO & customer info incomplete)
Product duplicates (same EAN/SKU more than once)
Product agent jobs in requires_intervention (Product Listing, SKU Validator stuck)
